3046760.name: Sweet Home 2: Look and Find Collector's Edition
3046760.description:
Avi Games presents another cozy collection of hidden-object fun with Sweet Home 2: Look and Find Collector's Edition!

Grab a warm blanket and get comfortable for more object-seeking and puzzle-solving in the fun first sequel in the series that proves that home is where the heart is! Take a nature hike, chill by the pool, and fire up the backyard grill while you hone your skills in each challenging level! While you're here, customize your room with decorations and furnishings, purchase items from a vast inventory, and make your space your own! Welcome home!


The Collector’s Edition includes:
Keep the fun going with eight exclusive locations!
Download gorgeous wallpapers to beautify your own space!
Chill out with the exclusive music player!
Eight bonus and replayable mini-games just for you!
3046760.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语
